data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The size and distance of interactive elements are optimized for faster user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Larger click targets for video controls, recommendations, and menu navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimized choices in menus to reduce decision time and improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation with concise categories and content filters.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunks of recommended video content ease cognitive load for users.
data.technical_spec: Curated playlists and suggestions based on user history and preferences.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design patterns align with user expectations for familiarity.
data.technical_spec: UI follows established patterns in video controls and channel page layouts.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together to aid user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Grouping related videos and channel suggestions on homepage and sidebars.
